basic_info.description: Welcome to my portfolio website! My name is Michelle Gunawan and I am a Computer Science and Business Economics student at UCLA. I am driven by a passion for creating, exploring, and strategizing. I am always seeking opportunities that challenge me to learn and grow✨. I enjoy working on projects - whether I'm on the technical or non-technical side of things - and especially love building for people💛. If you're interested in learning more about me, please take a look at my resume or CV. Thanks for visiting!
basic_info.description_fun: Besides that, I have an ardent love for hiking and am fascinated by language and culture.

projects.title: KARGO
projects.description: A personal project, KARGO was one of the most expanded application I had opportunity to work with. I've learned many technologies and solidified my skills in technoligies in which I had prior knowledge. The KARGO app allows people to get anything delivered no matter how big or small. The app allows users to see nearby KARGO kars and place KARGO delivery orders. Additionally, the app implements the Stripe payment API to allow users to pay for their orders.

projects.title: KARGO Driver
projects.description: A personal project, the KARGO driver app was aprojects that gave me the most insigt into AWS technology and how realtime connections between apps worked. The app allows KARGO drivers to recieve and accept delivery requests, and assists them with their navigation to the pickup and dropoff points.

projects.title: IBSA Website
projects.description: The IBSA Website is a website created for the Indonesian Bruin Association at UCLA in order to create an easy and efficient method for the club to communicate with it's 150+ members. was one of the first websites where I was able to take on the Front-end development role. It was a project in which I worked with a team and had to fulfill the request of the customer and deliver a satisfactory project. Through this project, I got to not only further my reactJS skills but was also able to learn about the development process and how to deliver a product to a customer.

projects.title: Discoveroo
projects.description: In order to learn about front-end development, I decided to buid a website from scratch. With the basics of reactJS and bootstrap, I was able to build Discoveroo a platform to find tutors, babysitters, cleaners, and other household help. Through this project I was also able to gain exposure to design. The idea initially begin as an app, and my first step was to create a figma prototype of the app which I then used to base the website off of. When I eventually switched to developing a website. I used adobe photoshop and aftereffects to create the designs on the login page and the logo.

more.title: IBSA
more.description: As Finance Officer for the Indonesian Bruin Association (IBSA), managed allocation of finances and came up with cost effective solutions in order to plan events to help build and cultivate UCLA's Indonesian community of over 150 students

more.title: CodeHERs
more.description: Founded CodeHERs, a program dedicated to creating a safe space for girls to explore and engage in the world of computer science and engineering, with the goal of bridging gender gap in the tech industry

more.title: PERMIAS Nasional
more.description: As Tech Officer for PERMIAS Nasional, assisted in the implementation of the best technologies to support the organization's mission of supporting the over 8,000 international Indonesian students going to school in the U.S.

more.title: NHS
more.description: As President, maintained effective communication with community members to organize service events allowing NHS members to contribute not only to the local community but to the international community as well
